Kansas City's Premier Bar & Grill

Events & Entertainment

Something happening every night of the week at Cory Frank's Bar & Grill — live music, karaoke, bingo, sports, and the kind of electric atmosphere that keeps the room buzzing.

See This Week's Lineup Host an Event

Visit us at 5410 NE Antioch Rd, Kansas City, MO 64118

Weekly Recurring Events

From karaoke classics to live bands and game-night energy, there’s always a reason to pull up to Cory Frank's.

Sunday

Karaoke with DJ Pepper

Every Sunday starting at 8PM.

Get the mic and show KC what you've got!

Tuesday

Xtreme Bar Bingo

Every Tuesday.

Not your grandma's bingo. Win prizes, drinks, and good times!

Wednesday

Live Music Open Jam

Every Wednesday at 7PM.

Local musicians welcome. Come jam with the best of KC!

Thursday

Karaoke

Every Thursday.

Mid-week karaoke to get you through the week!

Friday

Live Bands

Every Friday Night.

KC's best live bands take the stage!

Saturday

Live Bands

Every Saturday Night.

The weekend isn't complete without live music at Cory Frank's!

Game Day Ready

Catch Every Game

With 10 large flat-screen TVs throughout the bar & grill, Cory Frank's keeps every seat close to the action. We cover the NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, and more — so you never miss a big play.

  • ● Multiple screens for prime viewing from every angle
  • ● Great drink specials during games
  • ● High-energy crowd, cold drinks, and nonstop sports talk

10

Big Screens

4

Major Leagues

7

Nights of Action

100%

Game Time Energy

Private Events

Host Your Event Here

Planning a birthday bash, corporate outing, retirement party, or private celebration? Cory Frank's Bar & Grill brings the food, drinks, music, and atmosphere to make it unforgettable.

Perfect For

Birthdays, office parties, team nights, reunions, and more.

Reservation Note

Call us to reserve space and lock in your date.

Let's Plan It

Need a lively venue with strong drinks, good food, and a crowd-friendly vibe? This is your spot.

Location: 5410 NE Antioch Rd, Kansas City, MO 64118

Reservations: Please call ahead for private event availability.

Contact Us About Your Event

Live Every Week

Karaoke, open jam sessions, and live bands keep the calendar packed.

Sports + Specials

Big screens and game-day drink deals make every matchup better.

Private Party Ready

Book your next birthday, gathering, or company event with us.

FAQ

Event Questions, Answered

Do I need to make reservations for events?

For regular weekly events, just come ready to have fun. For private parties or larger groups, please call ahead to reserve space.

What nights have live music?

Live music shows and band nights run every Friday and Saturday, with open jam sessions on Wednesdays.

Is there something happening every night?

Yes — from karaoke and bingo to live bands and sports, Cory Frank's keeps the energy going all week long.

Make Cory Frank's Your Next Night Out

Whether you're here to sing, cheer, dance, or celebrate, our events page is your guide to the best nights in Kansas City.
